settings.title: Structured review
settings.text: Review packs can organise business summaries, checklists, supporting documents, fit criteria, and buyer questions in one place.

settings.title: Before deeper steps
settings.text: They are useful when a buyer wants to understand an opportunity before moving into a more detailed follow-up pathway.

settings.title: Confidentiality
settings.text: Some review materials may require staged information access.

settings.heading: Due diligence and review packs
settings.text: Review packs help buyers assess an opportunity with better structure before making a stronger commitment or requesting deeper information.

settings.heading: Before requesting review materials
settings.text: Review the access, application, confidentiality, and terms pages before requesting deeper information.
